Honest Thief (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,163,574Details
International Box Office $18,446,057
Worldwide Box Office $32,609,631
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,996,195
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,696,984
Total $6,693,179
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

Metrics

Legs:3.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,452,761

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Canada)
October 16th, 2020 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: October 8th, 2020 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Romania)
October 9th, 2020 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: December 8th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong violence, crude references and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2638 (Cert #52798), 7/15/2020)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Plot point: Bank Robbery, Corrupt Cops, FBI
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Raven Capital Management, Sculpter Media, Rainmaker Entertainment, Samuel Marshall Productions, The Solution Entertainment Group
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
